response:
## Triage plan — top 10 findings

**Headline order:** fix the four `high` findings first (one per file: `partner-logo.svg`, `billing.ts`, `date.ts` ×2). Then knock out the cheap wins in `src/api/files.ts` (localhost URL + home-path) and `src/date.ts` (timezone-unsafe parse) — same files, same agent context. Defer the second `direct_date` in `billing.ts` until the God Function split lands; bundle the weak test with that work.

### Frontend (1)
| # | id | finding | file | response | why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `crime_00001` | SVG With Embedded Raster | `src/assets/partner-logo.svg` | **fix now** | High sev, low-risk re-export; ship-blocking for any DPI scaling. |

### Structural — function/file shape (2)
| # | id | finding | file | response | why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2 | `crime_00002` | God Function `generateInvoice` (204 lines) | `src/billing.ts` | **fix now** | Gates every other billing edit; do extraction before piling on more fixes here. |
| 8 | `crime_00009` | Temporal Recklessness (7 calls) | `src/billing.ts` | **defer** | Bundle with the `generateInvoice` extraction — touching the same call sites twice is waste. |

### Structural — correctness / testability (5)
| # | id | finding | file | response | why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 3 | `crime_00003` | Temporal Recklessness (8 calls) | `src/date.ts` | **fix now** | High sev; inject a `now()` and make all date utilities deterministic in one pass. |
| 4 | `crime_00004` | Half-UTC, Half-Local on same receiver | `src/date.ts` | **fix now** | Silent off-by-one-day bugs at host-TZ offsets; touch with #3. |
| 9 | `crime_00010` | Timezone Roulette (unsafe parse) | `src/date.ts` | **fix now** | Same file as #3/#4 — fold in. |
| 6 | `crime_00006` | Dev-Server URL (`localhost:3000`) | `src/api/files.ts` | **fix now** | Cheap config move; breaks every non-local environment until done. |
| 7 | `crime_00007` | Localhost-on-Disk (`/Users/andrew/…`) | `src/api/files.ts` | **fix now** | Same file as #6, same fix shape — config-supplied path. |
| 10 | `crime_00011` | Test That Proves Nothing (no expects) | `src/billing.test.ts` | **fix now** | Two-line delete-or-assert; remove false confidence before refactoring billing (#2). |

### IA / agent context (1)
| # | id | finding | file | response | why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 5 | `crime_00005` | Missing Agent Context | repo root | **fix now** | One file (`AGENTS.md`) unblocks every future agent edit; near-zero risk. |

### git-history / duplication
None in the top 10 (the duplication findings — `crime_00012` string sprinkles, `crime_00018` nav source — and the IA-drift cluster sit just below). Address them in the next pass after the structural cleanup lands, since several touch files (`billing.ts`, `pricing.ts`, `nav/*`) that the top-10 fixes will already churn.

### Recommended commit sequence
1. `crime_00005` (AGENTS.md scaffold) — unblocks agent runs on the rest.
2. `crime_00011` (delete/assert the empty test) — cheap precondition for billing work.
3. `crime_00003` + `crime_00004` + `crime_00010` in `src/date.ts` — single PR, inject clock + unify UTC + fix parses.
4. `crime_00002` + `crime_00009` in `src/billing.ts` — extract `generateInvoice`, route remaining `Date.now()` through the new clock.
5. `crime_00006` + `crime_00007` in `src/api/files.ts` — config-supplied URL + portable path.
6. `crime_00001` (SVG re-export) — independent, drop in whenever.
